name: Shift Rotation Center
label: Shift Rotation Center
description: Shift projections so the rotation center is at the image midpoint

parameters.name: rotation_center
parameters.label: Center Offset
parameters.description: Offset of the rotation center from the image midpoint (0 = centered)

parameters.name: transform_source
parameters.label: Transformation Source
parameters.description: The source of the rotation center value (i.e., set it manually or load from a file)

parameters.name: transforms_save_file
parameters.label: Save Transformations File
parameters.description: Save transformations file to apply to other datasets later. Leave this blank to not save it.
